component.name: Aula F75 Max Driver
component.summary: Configure the Epomaker x Aula F75 Max keyboard
Настраивайте клавиатуру Epomaker x Aula F75 Max
Configura el teclado Epomaker x Aula F75 Max
Epomaker x Aula F75 Max klaviaturasini sozlang
Epomaker x Aula F75 Max пернетақтасын баптаңыз
Configure o teclado Epomaker x Aula F75 Max
配置 Epomaker x Aula F75 Max 键盘

description.p: Aula F75 Max Driver is a native Linux utility for configuring the Epomaker x Aula F75 Max keyboard display, RGB lighting, battery status, response level, sleep timeout, Game Mode, and HID diagnostics.
Aula F75 Max Driver - нативная Linux-утилита для настройки клавиатуры Epomaker x Aula F75 Max: дисплея, RGB-подсветки, батареи, отклика, sleep timeout, Game Mode и диагностики HID.

Aula F75 Max Driver es una utilidad nativa para Linux que configura el teclado Epomaker x Aula F75 Max: pantalla, iluminación RGB, batería, nivel de respuesta, suspensión, Game Mode y diagnóstico HID.
Aula F75 Max Driver - Epomaker x Aula F75 Max klaviaturasi displeyi, RGB yoritishi, batareyasi, javob darajasi, uyqu vaqti, Game Mode va HID diagnostikasini sozlash uchun native Linux utilitasi.

Aula F75 Max Driver - Epomaker x Aula F75 Max пернетақтасының дисплейін, RGB жарығын, батареясын, жауап деңгейін, ұйқы уақытын, Game Mode режимін және HID диагностикасын баптауға арналған native Linux утилитасы.
Aula F75 Max Driver é um utilitário nativo para Linux que configura o teclado Epomaker x Aula F75 Max: tela, RGB, bateria, nível de resposta, suspensão, Game Mode e diagnóstico HID.
Aula F75 Max Driver 是一款原生 Linux 工具，用于配置 Epomaker x Aula F75 Max 键盘屏幕、RGB 灯效、电池状态、响应等级、睡眠时间、Game Mode 和 HID 诊断。
The app communicates directly through Linux hidraw and hidapi, installs the required udev rule, and separates wired USB-C display workflows from 2.4G receiver settings.

ul.li: Upload PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, TIFF, and WebP images to the 128 x 128 keyboard display.
Control RGB lighting mode, brightness, speed, direction, fixed color, response level, and sleep timeout.
Read battery percentage through the 2.4G receiver and inspect HID endpoints for troubleshooting.

screenshot.caption: Main Aula F75 Max Driver window
HID endpoint diagnostics and app settings
